message:
fix(upgrade): capture exact semantic matches in ClosestMatch

The ClosestMatch field was only populated for "close" matches, not
"exact" semantic matches. This meant that when a platform-matching
asset existed (e.g., version mismatch scenario), ClosestMatch would
be nil even though there was relevant diagnostic info.

Fixed by:
- Preferring "exact" over "close" when populating ClosestMatch
- Adding test assertions to verify ClosestMatch is populated for
  exact semantic matches

Found during fresh-eyes code review.
